response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~14-15 years of experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems, but the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI/MCP tooling at re:cinq (since April 2025) and lacks the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products/platforms, or strategic advisory experience the role demands. No evidence of director-level influence, cloud architecture leadership at scale, or thought leadership in AI.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience (TypeScript, Node, DLang, mobile, embedded) approaching the 15-year mark
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source founder of GISCollective
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built and shipped at scale — core requirement unmet
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Director-level / Principal with strategic advisory or executive influence
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping product strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Seniority mismatch — Senior/Staff IC vs Director-level Principal
Strong software craftsmanship and full-stack breadth
